tagline: Player-first reference pages for the items, skills, and worlds that shape the Pazneria sandbox.
footerNote: Reference-first today, with room for future guides and lore once the export-backed core is fully polished.
intro: The codex is designed to answer practical player questions quickly: what an item does, how a skill loop works, and what a region actually offers.
It stays grounded in the canonical game export bundle so stable IDs, values, routes, services, and cross-links remain aligned with the source project.

homeSections.title: Readable First
homeSections.body: Guided summaries lead each page, while raw export data stays available underneath for deeper reference.

homeSections.title: Linked Systems
homeSections.body: Items, skills, and worlds cross-link through stable IDs so the codex can act as a dependable project-wide reference layer.

homeSections.title: Ready to Grow
homeSections.body: The v1 shell stays reference-focused now, but leaves clear visual space for future editorial pages, guides, and worldbuilding.
